rationale: Educ. Code §11.157 governs school district contracts for educational services with charter schools. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The board of trustees of an independent school district may contract with a public or private entity for that entity to provide educational services for the district.
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns educational service contracts, not property tax exemptions.
